name: Unsigned Executable Loaded In Sensitive System Process
notes:
This rule triggers when an unsigned driver is loaded in a sensitive process.

modfied to exempt System.Web.Extensions.dll from the rule
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

when the Event Payload contains FileVersion: 4.8.3761.0 Description: System.Web.Extensions.dll Product: Microsoft® .NET Framework Company: Microsoft Corporation OriginalFileName: System.Web.Extensions.dll Hashes: SHA1=F826A6192F57D97B112E8807B54C10A28D28EC48,MD5=D7EF57768C1AF2ADD90C233EC7E7365A,SHA256=17ACD04366C13EA74A7EA6C2AAE7C23BCE54599E1DD770B096450E32F944F6B2,IMPHASH=00000000000000000000000000000000 Signed: false Signature: - SignatureStatus: Unavailable User: NT AUTHORITY\SYSTE
when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches Signed (custom) is any of false
when an event matches any of the following Unsigned Executable Loaded In lsass
when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) Windows Sensitive Processes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when any of SHA256 Hash (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) File distributed by Microsoft - AlphaNumeric
TD_list: APPLY Unsigned Executable Loaded In Sensitive System Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log

AND NOT when the Event Payload contains FileVersion: 4.8.3761.0 Description: System.Web.Extensions.dll Product: Microsoft® .NET Framework Company: Microsoft Corporation OriginalFileName: System.Web.Extensions.dll Hashes: SHA1=F826A6192F57D97B112E8807B54C10A28D28EC48,MD5=D7EF57768C1AF2ADD90C233EC7E7365A,SHA256=17ACD04366C13EA74A7EA6C2AAE7C23BCE54599E1DD770B096450E32F944F6B2,IMPHASH=00000000000000000000000000000000 Signed: false Signature: - SignatureStatus: Unavailable User: NT AUTHORITY\SYSTE
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event matches Signed (custom) is any of false
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following Unsigned Executable Loaded In lsass
AND when any of Process Name (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) Windows Sensitive Processes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND NOT when any of SHA256 Hash (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) File distributed by Microsoft - AlphaNumeric
RED_list: Event name: Unsigned Executable Loaded Into Sensitive System Process
Event description: Unsigned Executable Loaded Into Sensitive System Process
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
